English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs records
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs
21-3-1304
15 cubic feet. 15 cubic feet.
[ca.1875]-1998. Manuscripts, Printed documents Includes surveys of graduates and records of the Cornell Office of Resident Instruction. Collection material in English 2073587
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, May 2013
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Prior to 1988, the office was known as Office of Resident Instruction. As of 1988, the name has been changed to the Office of Academic Programs.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes surveys of graduates and records of the Cornell Office of Resident Instruction.
Cite As:
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Office of Academic Programs records, #21-3-1304. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
